explanations.pt-br: Importamos PyTorch para criar tensores e executar a soma com kernels otimizados.
explanations.en-us: We import PyTorch to create tensors and run the addition with optimized kernels.

explanations.pt-br: Similar ao NumPy, mas usa tensores do PyTorch preparados para o Autograd.
explanations.en-us: Similar to NumPy, but uses PyTorch tensors prepared for Autograd.

explanations.pt-br: O PyTorch chama bibliotecas de alto desempenho como Intel MKL para acelerar o cálculo.
explanations.en-us: PyTorch calls high-performance libraries like Intel MKL to accelerate calculation.
